latestPosts.caption:
I almost lost my mom to a toxic job…

And I wrote this book because I saw first hand what the wrong job can do to you. Comment MOM to get our free pivot guide + all the pre-order bonuses. ❤️

My sweet momma worked 20+ years in a casino to support our family, and one day after work, couldn’t stop coughing up blood. We rushed her to the hospital for emergency surgery and found stage 3 endometrial cancer…. it was devastating. 

Luckily there is a happy ending to this story as my mom is now retired and recovering her to full strength but it’s something that’s shaped how we all look at our precious lives and careers. 

Work should fuel your life, not drain it. And in my book I talk about the exact steps I teach our clients to find what their ideal looks like and go all in to go get it. 

It is now available for preorder and it would mean the world to me if you go out and get a copy and gift a copy to those you love! 

If you read the book and implement the steps, it’ll completely change your life and career. Comment MOM to get the link and claim all your pre-order bonuses. 

And of course Happy Mother’s Day to my strong momma and all the super moms out there! We love you all ❤️

Thank you for your kind support.

Follow @workhap to curse all your enemies too 😌🤣

I’m in HK and passed by the iconic spot. Even Speed dropped by in his HK trip lol

To go the exact spot: go to the Canal Road West tram stop in Causeway Bay and you’ll see the aunties under the bridge! 

#career #jobs #hongkong #curse

Ridiculous test but how to PASS IT! 

And follow @workhap for daily career vids to get hired, paid, and HAPPY in your career!

I know it’s crazy we have to think what to do with a damn coffee cup but it just goes to show that companies judge you on the little things!

And ultimately it’s going to be these questions that you have to be a YES to get the job:

1. Do I like you?
2. Can you do the job?
3. Are you different?

I outline how to pass this coffee cup test in the video. But have you ever seen this play out in interviews?

Let me know in the comments!

Intro by @ chelsea.pixels

#career #jobs #coffeecup

Doing THIS will be the reason why you get ahead! 

Think about it. When did you ever really do it all alone? 

It’s rare because the best projects are a TEAM EFFORT.

And you can lead that charge by creating a Shared PDF Space in @adobeacrobat!

So the next time you’re owning a big project, upload all your docs and notes, and then give your team access to add their own!

When it’s time for the final recommendation, AI Assistant can take in all the feedback and notes, and help you give your best stuff to your boss.

Now that’s the way to do it! 

Check out Acrobat PDF Spaces! 

#AdobeAcrobatPartner #Career

Remember how scary it was to learn Excel for the first time? 

I think learning AI in 2026 feels the same... 

You know it’s a good skill to learn and lots you can build with it, but where do you start?

Well, that’s where you’ll find me because I’ll be at the @microsoftlearn AI Skills Fest!

Skills Fest takes place from June 8 - 12 and is a FREE, online global learning event designed to help people build practical AI skills in a focused, guided way.

And when you register, you will get entered to win prizes just for completing an AI Skills Fest playlist, like a VIP experience to Ignite and coaching from experts among much more.

Sign up today with link in profile!

See you there! #MicrosoftLearnPartner #Ad

Your job is KILLING you!

Comment SUMMER to join our free job search mastery classes and preorder our book!

Your job sucks and I want you to do something about it, my friend. 

If you got the Sunday scaries right now…. watch this and see which one applies. 

And to learn the real remedy to get out of a job and into a job you love, comment SUMMER to preorder our Get Hired book and join all our free bonus classes!

Intro by alexandraromanello

#career #newjob #sundayscaries

It’s a WEIRD time for work right now. Here are a few recent client stories that show that.

Btw comment SUMMER to join our free classes coming up!

1. One client got an offer, negotiated hard for a new salary, and…. they didn’t budge. At all. They gave an offer and said: “this is our best and final” as their first offer! Wild. 

2. Second client got sent home after taking a break from his desk and going out for a walk. He got reprimanded for taking a break! WTF are bosses doing these days?!

3. And another client got an offer after being let go within a few weeks! This one is obviously good news but just to share that you never know what is out there and can happen!

Are you feeling the weirdness at work too? 

P.S. Comment SUMMER to join all our free coaching sessions and masterclasses coming up! We went live last week and gonna do it again soon! 

#career #jobsearch

I know things feel scary right now… but you’re not alone, my friend.

The data shows that there is more uncertainty than ever before.​

- Korn Ferry found that as many as 70% of positions are filled internally or by referrals​

- That a traditional resume only accounts for about 10% of what gets someone a job​

- And nearly 60% of of employees believe that AI could replace their role in 3 years…​

But now is not the time to panic! 

It’s time to assess how things have changed and where they are going.​

We are in this together and can figure it out with great resources like @kornferry by our side.​

What’s been the most challenging part of your career journey so far?​

#kornferrypartner

As a millennial manager… this is what I’ve found work with some of my Gen Z team members 😂 

But I am no expert. I am still learning shit on the fly!

Gen Z been getting a lot of flack on the internet but I think they are the first generation to realize the game is rigged. And you know what… more power to them!

What are your best tips for a new manager?

#career #genz #manager #millennial

This work hack is not really a hack 😂 But bring your parents to work!

Comment PIVOT to join our free pivot masterclass coming up today at 10 AM PST!

I remember the first time I traveled for work and how cool I felt getting my own hotel room + using a corporate card. 

After living that life now for over 15+ years… the coolness factor has kinda worn away. But, it brings in a fresh new flavor when you can bring with you your people!

This time around I brought my parents to my most recent trip to LinkedIn Learning in Santa Barbara where I recorded our brand new course for networking and career pivots. 

During the day I shot my course. And at night, I partied hard with my parents 🤣 

They didn’t grow up in corporate so I’m glad I get to give them a little taste of what it looks like (only the fun stuff of course)

Btw if you want to join our FREE pivot masterclass coming up later today, comment PIVOT!

#career #pivot #parents
